name: codepit-workspace
description: Cockpit Codespace - AI-powered creative coding environment

scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run type-check
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && echo '✅ Build complete'
scripts.build:wasm:clean: cd wasm_renderer && rm -rf build dist public && npm run build:wasm
scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm && echo '🚀 Ready for development. Start your dev server (e.g., python -m http.server 8080)'
scripts.wasm:status: echo '=== WASM Renderer Status ===' && ls -la wasm_renderer/build/pkg 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ WASM built' || echo '❌ WASM not built. Run: npm run build'
scripts.wasm:clean: cd wasm_renderer && rm -rf build dist public && echo '🧹 WASM build cleaned'
scripts.postinstall: echo '💡 Tip: Run npm run build to build the WASM renderer'
